title: Error during XML conversion due to invalid character
symptom: When attempting to aggregate data and convert it to XML, n8n throws an 'Invalid character in name' error.
not_this_if: Error occurs without using the aggregate function
root_cause: The error arises when the XML conversion process encounters a name that contains invalid characters. This typically happens if the root name for the aggregated data is not set correctly, leading to malformed XML structure.
fix_steps: Set the root name of the aggregated data to 'data'.
agent_instruction: Ensure the root name for aggregation is set to 'data' before converting to XML.
